== Gi-integrity structural relational model ==
  checked: 3 entities, 2 relationships, 1 unique keys, 2 invariants carried, 4 solver commands generated, 1 committed artifacts fresh (byte-identical)
  ok
== G2-c4  Architecture Contract ==
  checked: 5 boundaries, 4 allow rules, 3 deny rules, 19 dsl elements, 5 boundaries bound to dsl, 5 mitigation rows, 7 dependencies with mitigation rows, 8 event contracts
  ok
== G3-machine  machines + oracle ==
  warn   Order.machine.json: liveness for rolledBack rests on an UNPROVEN _exhaustive claim (guards are erased in the TLA+ model, so TLC cannot check it); verify the guard set is provably total, or add an unguarded fallback branch so the liveness proof becomes sound
  warn   OutboxMessage.machine.json: liveness for rolledBack rests on an UNPROVEN _exhaustive claim (guards are erased in the TLA+ model, so TLC cannot check it); verify the guard set is provably total, or add an unguarded fallback branch so the liveness proof becomes sound
  warn   Payment.machine.json: liveness for gatewayResume, rolledBack rests on an UNPROVEN _exhaustive claim (guards are erased in the TLA+ model, so TLC cannot check it); verify the guard set is provably total, or add an unguarded fallback branch so the liveness proof becomes sound
  warn   Reservation.machine.json: liveness for rolledBack rests on an UNPROVEN _exhaustive claim (guards are erased in the TLA+ model, so TLC cannot check it); verify the guard set is provably total, or add an unguarded fallback branch so the liveness proof becomes sound
  warn   Shipment.machine.json: liveness for rolledBack rests on an UNPROVEN _exhaustive claim (guards are erased in the TLA+ model, so TLC cannot check it); verify the guard set is provably total, or add an unguarded fallback branch so the liveness proof becomes sound
  note   Order.machine.json: state rolledBack always-list is fully guarded; liveness rests on the declared exhaustiveness: priorStatus is set by every setPending* action to the current domain state; only Pending, Confirmed, Reserved, Paid, and Shipped have transitions into the persist overlay (final states persist nothing), and all five priorIs* guards are present
  note   OutboxMessage.machine.json: state rolledBack always-list is fully guarded; liveness rests on the declared exhaustiveness: priorStatus is set on every path into the overlay from a domain state; only Pending and Published reach the overlay (Consumed is final), and both priorIs* guards are present; a rollback to Pending is precisely the at-least-once re-drive point for the next poller sweep
  note   Payment.machine.json: state gatewayResume always-list is fully guarded; liveness rests on the declared exhaustiveness: gatewayOp is set by setGatewayAuthorize/setGatewayCapture/setGatewayRefund before entering the three gateway-call states, the only states that reach gatewayRetry; the three gatewayFor* guards cover {authorize, capture, refund} totally
  note   Payment.machine.json: state rolledBack always-list is fully guarded; liveness rests on the declared exhaustiveness: priorStatus is set on every path into the overlay from a domain state; only Pending, Authorized, and Captured reach the overlay (Failed and Refunded are final), and all three priorIs* guards are present
  note   Reservation.machine.json: state rolledBack always-list is fully guarded; liveness rests on the declared exhaustiveness: only Held has transitions into the persist overlay (Committed and Released are final), so priorStatus is always Held and the single priorIsHeld guard is total
  note   Shipment.machine.json: state rolledBack always-list is fully guarded; liveness rests on the declared exhaustiveness: priorStatus is set on every path into the overlay from a domain state; only Pending, Dispatched, and InTransit reach the overlay (Delivered and Lost are final), and all three priorIs* guards are present
  checked: 6 machines, 138 transitions, 6 oracles fresh, 168 named units covered, 6 states relying on unproven _exhaustive liveness
